# Paycheck MD

> Physician tax planning and income tracking for W-2 and 1099 physicians. Paycheck MD helps doctors track income, withholding, tax reserves, and estimated tax progress across employment types.

## Pages

- [Tax Estimate](/estimate): Public quick tax estimator for physicians with W-2 and/or 1099 income.
- [1099 Tax Deductions Guide](/blog/1099-tax-deductions): Guide to common freelance and independent-contractor write-offs including home office, mileage, health insurance, retirement, and QBI.
